endpoints.docstring:
Get detailed evaluation for a specific AAV serotype.

Returns tropism, immunogenicity, clinical precedent, and
packaging feasibility for all cargo types.
List all therapeutic cargo types with sizes and genome configurations.

Evaluate AAV capsids for SMA gene therapy delivery.

Ranks 9 AAV serotypes by composite suitability score considering:
motor neuron tropism, BBB crossing, immunogenicity, manufacturing, and packaging.
Filter compounds by ADMET properties.
Overall ADMET statistics for the full compound library.
Top N compounds sorted by a chosen ADMET property.
Add a new ion channel entry.
Update an existing ion channel by gene symbol.
Add a new bioelectric intervention.
List all contact form messages (admin only).

Generate a comprehensive Scientific Advisory Pack.

5-section research summary suitable for sharing with
external collaborators, professors, and grant reviewers.
List past discovery campaigns (most recent first) and current status.

Launch an autonomous drug discovery campaign for the given target.

Orchestrates the full pipeline:
  1. Check baseline convergence score
  2. Get candidate compounds from screening library
  3. Filte

List available tools for the drug discovery agent.

Shows which NVIDIA NIMs are configured and ready, based on
environment variables (NVIDIA_API_KEY, etc.).
Comprehensive platform analytics summary.

Ask a research question about SMA — answered via RAG over the evidence base.

Uses hybrid search (semantic + keyword) to find relevant claims and papers,
then synthesizes an answer using Claude Sonnet

Compare a candidate ASO sequence to nusinersen (Spinraza).

Provides side-by-side comparison on length, GC content, melting
temperature, predicted binding energy, self-complementarity, BBB
penetration

Generate novel ASO candidates targeting a SMN2 regulatory region.

Designs antisense oligonucleotides scored by target complementarity,
GC content, melting temperature, predicted binding energy (delta

Generate candidate ASO sequences for a target region.

Designs antisense oligonucleotides targeting the specified SMN2 regulatory
element, scored by target complementarity, GC content, melting tempera

List available ASO target regions on SMN2.

Returns sequence, location, mechanism, antisense complement, and GC
content for each targetable regulatory element. Includes ISS-N1
(nusinersen target), ISS

Quick intrinsic score of an ASO sequence (no target required).

Evaluates GC content, melting temperature, binding energy, length,
self-complementarity, and BBB penetration potential. Returns pass/fai

Score a custom ASO sequence against a SMN2 target region.

Evaluates the ASO on all design criteria: target complementarity,
GC content (40-60% ideal), melting temperature (nearest-neighbor method),
p

List all known SMN2 regulatory regions targetable by ASOs.

Alias for /aso/regions. Returns sequence, location, mechanism, and
antisense complement for each region.

Get a single hypothesis in full assay-ready format.

Returns a complete experiment specification that a CRO or wet-lab
team can execute directly.

Get the top 3 EVE-scored hypotheses in full assay-ready format.

Returns complete experiment specifications: biological rationale,
recommended assay, model system, readouts, Go/No-Go criteria,
estimat

Bayesian posteriors for all targets, sorted by posterior mean.

Optionally filter by minimum claim count or evidence sufficiency.

Compare Bayesian evidence between two targets.

Returns P(A > B) via Monte Carlo sampling, posterior summaries,
and a human-readable verdict.

Bayesian posterior for a single target's therapeutic validity.

Uses Beta(1,1) prior updated with claim evidence. Returns posterior
mean, mode, 95% credible interval, Bayes factor, and evidence suffic

Auto-evaluate claim extraction quality using multiple signals.

Scores claims on 6 dimensions without manual labeling:
- **specificity**: predicate length vs ideal range
- **entities**: presence of ge

Break down automated claim quality scores by claim_type.

Returns per-type average quality, count, min/max scores, and
top issues for each claim type in the database.

Submit a gold-standard evaluation for a single claim.

Requires admin authentication via X-Admin-Key header.

Labels:
- **correct**: Claim accurately represents what the abstract states
- **incorrect*

Get extraction quality metrics from existing gold-standard evaluations.

Returns precision, recall estimate, F1 score, and per-claim-type breakdown.
Requires evaluations to have been submitted via POS

Sample claims with their source abstracts for manual gold-standard review.

Returns claims paired with the abstract they were extracted from,
excluding claims that have already been evaluated.

Test extraction reproducibility by re-extracting claims from source abstracts.

Re-runs the claim extraction pipeline on a random sample of sources
that already have claims, then measures how many of

Design protein binders for an SMA target using Proteina-Complexa (GTC 2026).

This is a new therapeutic modality — designed protein binders that can
target SMA-relevant proteins with high specificity.
List SMA targets available for protein binder design.
Get ion channel expression profile in SMA motor neurons.
Get electroceutical interventions for SMA.
Full bioelectric analysis of SMA motor neurons.
Get Vmem state classification for SMA motor neurons.

Full biomarker atlas: curated reference catalog combined with
dynamically aggregated claims from the evidence database.

Returns:
- curated_catalog: expert-curated biomarkers with PMID references
- ca

Filter the curated biomarker catalog by category.

Valid categories: molecular, functional, imaging, electrophysiology.
Optionally filter to only validated biomarkers.

Also returns matching DB claims

Query the curated SMA biomarker reference catalog.

Supports filtering by category, type, and validation status.
No database required — returns instantly from the in-memory catalog.

Summary statistics for the curated biomarker catalog.

Returns counts by category, type, and validation status.

Return the biomarker layer definitions (markers and keywords per layer).

Useful for frontend to display layer metadata without querying claims.

Biomarker claims linked to a specific target.

Returns claims grouped by layer (molecular, imaging, functional,
electrophysiology, fluid), with a separate treatment-response subset.

Biomarkers relevant to monitoring treatment response.

Returns both:
1. Curated pharmacodynamic/efficacy biomarkers from the reference catalog
2. DB claims mentioning treatment-response keywords (nusi
List blackboard messages with optional filters.
Post a new message to the blackboard. Requires x-admin-key header.
Delete expired blackboard messages. Requires x-admin-key header.
Aggregate statistics: counts by type, by agent, total, and recent activity.
Mark a message as read by the given agent. Requires x-admin-key header.

Run a prospective backtest with the given lookback period.

Simulates running the convergence engine at (now - months) and compares
what it would have predicted against outcomes discovered since then.

Run convergence scoring at a specific historical cutoff date.

Simulates what the convergence engine would have produced if run
at the given date, using only claims created before that date.

Path par

Full prospective backtest report (alias for /backtest/temporal).

Comprehensive assessment including: temporal accuracy curve, midpoint
comparison, recent predictions, rank stability, and overall grad

Full temporal backtest curve.

Automatically determines the data range and runs backtests at multiple
timepoints (every step_months months). Shows how predictive accuracy
evolves over time as more evi

Calibration curve: convergence score bins vs actual drug success rates.

Bins drug outcomes by their target's convergence score (0-0.2, 0.2-0.4, etc.)
and computes the actual success rate in each bin.

Compare convergence scores of approved vs failed drugs.

Groups drug outcomes by type (success, failure, ongoing) and computes
mean/median convergence scores per group. Measures separation between
app

Full Bayesian evidence calibration report.

Back-tests convergence scores against known drug outcomes (approved,
failed, ongoing) from the drug_outcomes table. Returns calibration
percentage, grade, s

Validate a specific target's convergence score against its drug outcomes.

For the given target, compares the convergence score with the actual
success/failure rate of drugs targeting it. Returns cali

Generate calibration curve data -- predicted confidence vs actual replication rate.

Bins all claims by confidence (0-0.2, 0.2-0.4, 0.4-0.6, 0.6-0.8, 0.8-1.0)
and for each bin computes:
- mean_confide

Calibrate hypothesis confidence for SMN1/SMN2 targets.

Checks whether hypotheses about the validated SMA targets (SMN1, SMN2)
have the highest confidence scores. Returns rank distribution and
confide

Calibrate synergy predictions against approved drug-target pairs.

Checks if the 3 approved SMA drugs rank in the top positions when
predictions are sorted by synergy score. Returns precision@k,
mean

Full confidence calibration report.

Evaluates synergy predictions, hypothesis confidence scores, and claim
calibration curves against the 3 approved SMA drugs (nusinersen, risdiplam,
onasemnogene) an

Full uncertainty quantification report for all targets.

Computes Wilson score confidence intervals on the support ratio
(fraction of high-confidence claims) for every target with >= 3 claims.
Combine

Uncertainty quantification for a single target.

Returns:
- Support ratio with 95% Wilson CI (lower, upper)
- Claim counts: support / oppose / neutral
- Source diversity (unique labs)
- Temporal stabi

Side-by-side comparison: wild-type SMN1 vs SMN2 with the variant.

Shows exactly where the cascade diverges between the functional SMN1
gene and the SMN2 copy carrying the specified variant. Identifie

Return pre-computed cascades for well-known SMA variants.

Includes the critical c.840C>T (THE cause of SMA), known pathogenic
missense variants, modifier variants, and any high-impact variants
identi

Predict the full mutation-to-function cascade for a single variant.

Traces the variant through 5 steps:
1. Splice impact (SpliceAI GPU scores or rule-based)
2. Protein change (exon skip → truncation,

Multi-turn conversational research assistant.

Send a message with optional conversation history. The server is stateless —
conversation context is maintained by the client sending previous exchanges.
List claims with filters, optionally enriched with source paper details.
Get claim counts with optional filters — used for pagination.
Get all evidence supporting a specific claim.
Export claims in a structured format for external analysis.
Export all positive virtual screening hits.
Quick summary of what the platform offers — for new collaborators.

Export all platform data for a target in a researcher-friendly format.

No authentication required — all data is from public sources.
Suitable for supplementary materials, grant applications, or colla
Rank all possible SMA therapy combinations by composite score.
Get the top 3 recommended therapy combinations for SMA.
List all cross-species target mappings.

Map all human SMA targets to orthologs across model organisms.

Queries NCBI for each target and stores results in cross_species_targets.
Get all ortholog mappings for the heatmap visualization.

Get orthologs for a human gene symbol across model organisms.

Checks the database first, falls back to live NCBI query.
List model organisms with target mapping counts.
Compare two SMA targets across all dimensions.
Store a contact form submission and notify via Slack.
List convergence scores for all scored targets.

Trigger batch convergence score computation for all targets.

Requires admin API key. Upserts into convergence_scores table.
Trigger batch convergence score computation for all targets.

Get prediction cards enriched with convergence breakdown.

Each prediction includes: convergence score, confidence level,
evidence breakdown, claim type distribution, and suggested experiments.
Get prediction card for a specific target by symbol.

Get evidence convergence scores for all SMA targets.

Scores based on 5 dimensions: claim volume, lab independence,
method diversity, temporal trend, and replication.
Weights version v1.
Get detailed convergence score for a specific target by symbol.
Get convergence score breakdown for a specific target.

Retrieve CRISPR guides from the database.

For SMN2/SMN1: returns pre-computed guides with therapeutic motif annotations.
Use POST /crispr/guides to design guides for a custom DNA sequence.

Design CRISPR guides for a custom DNA sequence (compute-only, not persisted).

Accepts 23-10000 nt DNA and scans both strands for 20nt protospacer + NGG PAM.

Return all known SMN2 exon 7 regulatory motifs.

Includes ISS-N1 (nusinersen target), ESE (Tra2-beta), ESS (hnRNP A1),
Element2, C6T disease position, and branch point.

(Admin) Re-seed the database with computed SMN2 guides.

Clears existing SMN2 guides and strategies, then re-computes from
the reference sequence and inserts fresh results.
List all CRISPR therapeutic strategies stored in the database.
Return a single therapeutic strategy with its top guides.

List curated RNA-seq datasets relevant to SMA research.

Returns a hand-curated catalog of publicly available RNA-seq datasets
spanning multiple platforms (Nanopore direct RNA, Illumina short-read,
10

List Nanopore direct RNA sequencing datasets for SMA.

Returns entries from the curated catalog that use Oxford Nanopore
technology.  These datasets are especially valuable because direct
RNA sequenci

Risk assessment for a single hypothesis.

Returns risk_score (0-1), risk_level, and detailed risk_factors
explaining why this hypothesis may be heading toward a dead end.

Known drug failure patterns extracted from drug_outcomes data.

Shows which targets and mechanisms are most associated with
drug failure — useful for avoiding known dead ends.

Risk assessment for all active hypotheses based on failure patterns.

Hypotheses are scored by overlap with known drug failure profiles.
Higher risk_score = more overlap with historical failures.

Find new claims that confirm existing hypotheses.

Shows which hypotheses are receiving fresh supporting evidence.

Find targets with claims but no hypotheses — potential discoveries.

These are targets the platform has evidence for but hasn't formalized
into testable hypotheses yet. Researchers should review these

Trigger the full auto-discovery pipeline (admin only).

Detects claim spikes, hypothesis confirmations, and novel targets,
then scores and stores breakthrough signals.

List breakthrough signals detected by the auto-discovery pipeline.

Signals are ranked by composite_score (novelty × convergence × impact).
Researchers can filter by type and minimum score threshold.

View claim volume spikes per target in the last N days.

A "spike" means a target received significantly more claims than its
monthly baseline — indicates active research interest or new findings.

Dock a batch of compounds against a self-hosted DiffDock instance.

Sends compounds in parallel batches of 10 to the GPU instance.
Requires admin key — this triggers GPU compute costs.

Destroy a Vast.ai DiffDock instance when screening is complete.

Always destroy instances after use to avoid ongoing GPU charges.

Estimate GPU cost and time for a virtual screening campaign.

Based on ~5 compounds/sec throughput on A100 at ~$1.50/hr.
No admin key required — informational endpoint.

Check if a self-hosted DiffDock instance is healthy and ready.

No admin key required — useful for monitoring.

Launch a Vast.ai GPU instance with the DiffDock NIM container.

Requires NGC_API_KEY env var and vastai CLI installed.
Returns the instance ID, SSH URL, and API URL for docking.
List all available target binding pockets with characteristics.

Score top drug-like compounds against a target binding pocket.

Pharmacophore-based scoring proxy — predicts binding affinity from
molecular descriptors and pocket characteristics without requiring
Au
Score a single compound against a binding pocket.
List drug outcomes with optional filtering.
Get summary statistics for the Drug Failure & Success Database.
Get clinical trials related to a specific drug.

Preview enrichment without modifying data.

Returns the same stats as /run plus sample_matches showing
what would be linked.
Requires admin key.

Run claim enrichment — scan unlinked claims and link to targets/drugs.

Scans predicate text for gene/protein/drug mentions using
case-insensitive word-boundary pattern matching.
Requires admin key.

Get current claim-target linking status.

Returns total claims, linked/unlinked counts, link rate,
and breakdown by subject_type.
List evidence records linking claims to sources.
Identify evidence gaps — where research is thin or missing for a target.
Auto-expand the knowledge graph from claims, drug outcomes, and conservation data.

Get all hypotheses ranked by Expected Value of Experiment (EVE).

EVE = P(success) * Impact / (Cost + Time)

Returns hypotheses sorted by EVE score descending, with full breakdown
of success probabili
Get EVE score for a single hypothesis with full breakdown.

Rank all targets by Expected Value of experiment.

EV = P(success) * Scientific_Impact / (Cost_K / 10)

Answers: "If I have $50K and 3 months, which experiment should I run first?"

Optionally filter

Get detailed EV score for a single target with full breakdown.

EV = P(success) * Scientific_Impact / (Cost_K / 10)

If convergence is not provided, it is looked up from the convergence_scores
table i

All targets with evidence gaps, sorted by priority.

Shows which targets have the biggest gaps in evidence coverage
and what experiments would be most valuable to fill those gaps.

Analyze evidence gaps for a target and suggest experiments to fill them.

Returns present evidence types, missing types, and prioritized
assay recommendations ranked by gap_size * target_importance *

Batch-generate experimental proposals for all hypotheses in a tier.

Converts prioritized hypotheses into concrete experimental proposals
with assays, model systems, readouts, go/no-go criteria, timel

Generate a concrete experimental proposal for a single hypothesis.

Analyzes the hypothesis type (binding, expression, drug efficacy,
splicing) and returns a structured proposal including:
- Suggested

Export all evidence for a specific target: claims, sources, evidence links.

Formats:
- json: Full evidence package with claims, sources, and metadata
- csv: Flat CSV with one row per claim+source pai

Export a table as JSON or CSV for research use.

Available tables: targets, drugs, trials, claims, hypotheses,
graph_edges, drug_outcomes, cross_species_targets, target_scores.
Extract structured claims from all unprocessed paper abstracts using LLM.

Extract structured drug failure/success outcomes from SMA literature.

Builds the Drug Failure & Success Database — captures why drugs succeeded or
failed, with structured failure reasons (toxicity, e

Full FAIR compliance audit of the SMA Research Platform.

Scores the platform across all 14 FAIR sub-principles (F1-F4, A1-A4,
I1-I3, R1-R3), returning per-dimension scores, an overall score (0-1),
a

Auto-generated data dictionary for the platform database.

Lists all tables, columns, types, constraints, and descriptions.
Includes controlled vocabularies and external identifier mappings.
Uses live

Actionable recommendations to improve FAIR compliance.

Returns prioritised recommendations with effort estimates, expected
impact, and concrete implementation steps.
Get data sharing tier framework (4 tiers with privacy levels).
Get OMOP/OHDSI concept mappings for SMA clinical data.
Calculate privacy budget for a research scenario.
Get federated learning protocol specifications for SMA research.
Estimate drug-likeness properties for a single SMILES (no RDKit).
Get results from a completed funnel run.

Start a screening funnel pipeline run.

Orchestrates: Generate -> Filter -> ML Proxy -> DiffDock -> Candidates.
Pure SMILES-based drug-likeness estimation (no RDKit required).
Get status of any running funnel job.
Get summary of all funnel runs with aggregate statistics.

Simulate and version a custom sequence edit.

Creates a parent→child version pair with diff, like a git commit.

Get the SMN2 exon 7 version tree — all known variants as 'commits'.

Shows the lineage: SMN1 (healthy) → SMN2 (C6T disease mutation)
→ therapeutic edits (base edit correction, ESE enhancement, ESS dis
Generate hypothesis cards for all targets by cross-referencing claims.
Generate a hypothesis card for a single target.
List GPU jobs with optional status filter.
Create a GPU job record.
Get a single GPU job by ID.

Return CRISPR off-target statistics grouped by mismatch count.

Used by the frontend GPU Results section.

Return SpliceAI splice-score statistics and top variants by max delta score.

Used by the frontend GPU Results section.

Return knowledge graph as nodes + edges for visualization.

By default excludes compound_bioactivity edges (191 edges) to keep
the graph focused on biological relationships.
Get all nodes and edges for knowledge graph visualization.
Summary statistics for the knowledge graph.

Generate assay-ready validation cards for all positive screening hits.

For each drug-like hit (pChEMBL >= 5.0, Lipinski pass), returns a
target-specific wet-lab validation plan with:
- Hypothesis: wh

Generate assay cards for custom screening hits (not from the database).

Accepts a list of hits with smiles, target, and docking_confidence.
Returns target-specific wet-lab validation plans.
Get summary of all screening hit milestones and their validation status.
Create validation milestones for positive screening hits.
Validate screening hits against ChEMBL, PubMed, PubChem, and platform claims.
Validate a single screening hit.

Create a hypothesis card directly (admin).

Unlike /hypotheses/generate which uses LLM synthesis from claims,
this endpoint allows direct insertion of curated hypotheses
(e.g., from convergence synthe

View current convergence signals without generating hypotheses.

Returns claim clusters where multiple independent sources converge on
the same molecular target — candidates for hypothesis generation.

Trigger hypothesis generation from new evidence convergence.

Scans claims from the last *days_back* days, identifies convergence
signals, synthesizes hypotheses via Claude Haiku, and stores results
i

Rank all hypotheses by multi-criteria score, assign action tiers.

Tier A: Top 5 high-conviction hypotheses ready for Phase 3.
Tier B: Medium-priority, need more evidence or refinement.
Tier C: Low-pr
Scan bioRxiv + medRxiv for SMA-relevant preprints and store as sources.

Pull bioactivity data from ChEMBL for all gene targets.

Searches ChEMBL for each gene target in the database, retrieves
bioactivity records, and stores compound-target edges in graph_edges.

Update target metadata with ESM-2 embedding information.

Stores embedding metadata (model, dim, sequence length) in the targets
table metadata column for each matching target symbol.

Fetch full-text papers from PubMed Central OA for sources that only have abstracts.

Sources: Europe PMC → NCBI PMC → Unpaywall (in order of preference).

Pull protein-protein interactions from STRING and pathway data from KEGG.

Populates graph_edges table for network_centrality scoring.
Import Cas-OFFinder off-target results into crispr_offtargets table.

Import SMA-related patents into the sources table.

Google Patents blocks server IPs (returns 503), so patents should be
fetched locally and uploaded as JSON.  Two modes:

1. **json_path** (recommende

Pull protein annotations from UniProt for all gene targets.

Maps each gene symbol to its UniProt accession, fetches full protein
annotations (GO terms, pathways, function), and stores shared-pathway
Pull recent SMA papers from PubMed and store in sources table.

Import SpliceAI delta scores into splice_scores table.

Uses UPSERT on (chrom, pos, ref, alt) to avoid duplicates.

Fetch AlphaFold protein structure predictions for core SMA proteins.

Uses the pre-defined SMA_PROTEINS mapping (SMN1, SMN2, PLS3, STMN2,
NCALD, UBA1, CORO1C) to fetch structure predictions and pLDDT

Fetch results for completed SMA trials and store as sources for claim extraction.

Calls ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API for all completed SMA trials that have posted
results (outcome measures, adverse even
Pull all SMA clinical trials from ClinicalTrials.gov.
Get standardized SMA assay library (8 assays).
Get cloud lab integration specs (Emerald, Strateos, Opentrons).
Generate experiment design from a hypothesis.

Examples of genotype-phenotype discordance in SMA.

Returns clinical scenarios where SMN2 copy number alone fails to
predict disease severity — including asymptomatic carriers, discordant
siblings, un

List known phenotype modifiers beyond SMN2 copy number.

Covers SMN2 splicing efficiency, modifier genes (PLS3, NCALD, NAIP),
gene conversion events, intragenic variants, epigenetics, and
polygenic ba

Get comprehensive SMN locus information — why copy number alone doesn't predict phenotype.

Returns locus architecture (SMN1 vs SMN2, the critical C>T difference),
all known phenotype modifiers with t

Generate complete OpenMM MD simulation scripts for an SMA target.

Returns 3 ready-to-run Python scripts:
1. Setup (structure loading, solvation, minimization, equilibration)
2. Production (NPT ensemb

List all available SMA molecular dynamics simulation templates.

6 simulation types covering: SMN oligomerization, hnRNP A1-ISS-N1 binding,
risdiplam-SMN2 interaction, NCALD calcium dynamics, PLS3 act

Predict DiffDock confidence for a batch of compounds.

~1000x faster than running DiffDock. Processes thousands of compounds
in milliseconds where DiffDock would take days. Results are sorted by
predi

Screen all compounds in the molecule_screenings DB table using the
trained ML proxy. Returns the top-K predicted binders ranked by
predicted DiffDock confidence.

This enables screening the full libra

Return model statistics, training data info, and accuracy metrics.

Includes R2, MAE, OOB R2 (RandomForest), feature importances (top 20),
cross-validation scores, target/source distributions, and sca

Train or retrain the v2 proxy model on all available DiffDock results.

Uses RDKit Morgan fingerprints (ECFP4, 2048-bit) + target one-hot encoding
with a RandomForestRegressor (500 trees). Falls back

Compare modalities for all SMA targets.

Returns a list of modality comparisons for every target in the platform,
each ranked by feasibility.

Compare therapeutic modalities for an SMA target.

Returns all applicable modalities (small molecule, ASO, CRISPR, gene therapy,
protein binder) ranked by feasibility, with pros/cons, development time
List all SMA mouse models with phenotype data.
Compare two SMA mouse models.
Motor neuron counting reproducibility problem (0-80% variation).

Get all evidence supporting a specific modifier gene's role in SMA.

Returns published literature references (PMIDs), mechanism details,
and any related claims from the database.

Return all known SMA modifier genes with evidence and effect details.

Lists PLS3, NCALD, NAIP, SERF1, GTF2H2, CORO1C with their mechanisms,
published PMIDs, magnitude of effect, and database claim co

Predict SMA phenotype severity from SMN2 copies and modifier gene status.

Example: `/modifier/predict?smn2_copies=3&pls3=high&ncald=low`

Returns predicted SMA type, severity score (0-1), confidence
Paginated molecule listing with filters and sorting.
Export molecules as CSV or SDF for researchers/chemists.
Aggregate statistics for the molecule collection.
Get full details for a single molecule.
Get combination therapy strategies for multisystem SMA.
Get energy budget analysis for SMA motor neurons.
Full multisystem SMA analysis.
Get organ systems affected in SMA beyond motor neurons.

Build the full drug-target interaction network.

Returns nodes (drugs, targets) and edges (interactions) with evidence counts.
Combines: graph_edges, ChEMBL bioactivity (molecule_screenings), claims,
Get all interactions for a specific target.
List published news posts, newest first, with pagination.
Create a new news post. Requires x-admin-key header.
List comments for admin moderation. Requires x-admin-key header.
Approve a pending comment. Requires x-admin-key header.
Delete a spam/rejected comment. Requires x-admin-key header.
Generate RSS 2.0 XML feed of published news posts.
Get a single post by slug with approved comments.
Update a news post by slug. Requires x-admin-key header.
Submit a comment on a news post. Public endpoint with spam detection.
Check AlphaFold DB for SMA protein complex predictions (GTC 2026 expansion).

Predict protein structure using AlphaFold2 NIM.
Uses MSA for high-accuracy structure prediction.
Slower than ESMfold but more accurate for novel proteins.

Predict protein complex structure using AlphaFold2-Multimer NIM.
Supports 1-6 protein chains.

List all designed protein binders.

Returns ``{"binders": [...]}`` with field names the frontend expects:
target, design, has_structure (derived from pdb_path).

Design a protein binder for a target using RFdiffusion NIM.
Creates novel protein backbones that bind to specified hotspot residues.
Useful for designing therapeutic proteins against ROCK2, MAPK14, LI

End-to-end binder design pipeline for ROCK2:
1. Download ROCK2 AlphaFold structure
2. RFdiffusion: design binder backbones
3. ProteinMPNN: design sequences for backbones

Design amino acid sequences for a protein backbone using ProteinMPNN NIM.
Use after RFdiffusion to get sequences for designed backbones.
Alias for /molecules — the frontend uses this path.

Dock a compound to a protein target using DiffDock v2.2 NIM.
Default target: SMN2 (AlphaFold structure auto-downloaded).
List extended DiffDock campaign results (legacy endpoint).

Get protein embeddings using ESM-2 650M NIM.

STATUS: DEGRADED — NVIDIA returns 500 errors intermittently.
Includes automatic retry logic (3 attempts with exponential backoff).

Fast protein structure prediction using ESMfold NIM.
No MSA required — uses protein language model directly.
Much faster than AlphaFold2, good for screening many proteins.

Extended DiffDock campaign results for the GPU Results section.

Returns ``{"total": N, "unique_drugs": N, "unique_targets": N,
"avg_confidence": float, "results": [...]}`` with field names
matching t

Generate novel molecules based on a scaffold using GenMol v1.0 NIM.
Default: 4-AP scaffold decoration for SMN2-targeting analogs.
Check NVIDIA NIM API health and API key status.

List all AI-generated molecules.

Returns ``{"molecules": [...]}`` with field names the frontend expects.

Run multiple sequence alignment using ColabFold MSA NIM.
Searches Uniref30, PDB70, colabfold_envdb.
Required as input for AlphaFold2 pipeline.

Aggregated stats for the GPU Results overview cards.

Returns field names matching the frontend expectations:
- binders_designed, molecules_generated
- structures_alphafold, structures_esmfold, struct

Predict biomolecular complex structure using OpenFold3 NIM.
Supports protein, RNA, and ligand inputs.

List predicted protein structures for the GPU Results section.

Returns ``{"structures": [...]}`` with field names the frontend expects:
target (from target_symbol/symbol), method (from method_label/s

Re-dock 4-Aminopyridine against SMN2 using DiffDock v2.2.
Validates our original finding (+0.100) with the improved model.

Predict RNA 3D structure using RNAPro.

NOTE: RNAPro has NO cloud API on build.nvidia.com (returns 404).
This endpoint only works when RNAPRO_SELF_URL is configured
(self-hosted on Vast.ai or similar

Predict SMN2 pre-mRNA 3D structure around exon 7 using OpenFold3.
Novel analysis — no prior RNA structure prediction for this region.
Get organ-on-chip models for NMJ validation (PostgreSQL-backed).
Get EV therapeutic cargo options for NMJ delivery (PostgreSQL-backed).
Full analysis of the 'happy muscle → surviving neuron' hypothesis (DB-backed).
Get retrograde signaling molecules at the NMJ (PostgreSQL-backed).

Full catalog of publicly available SMA-relevant RNA-seq data.

Searches both NCBI SRA and ENA, deduplicates, and groups results
into categories: direct_rna, cdna_rnaseq, motor_neuron_specific,
sma_pat
